title: NOC 60010 – Corporate Sales Managers | GTR Immigration
description: In Canada’s competitive business landscape, NOC 60010 (Corporate Sales Managers) are the engines of revenue growth. These TEER 0 leaders are responsible for directing sales teams and expanding market share across industries like tech, manufacturing, and finance. For immigration, this high-level managerial role is a prime candidate for the Federal Skilled Worker program and specialized PNP Managerial streams, offering a fast-track to Permanent Residency.

classification.teer: Classification LevelDetailsBroad Occupation Category6 – Sales and service occupationsTEER Level0Major Group60 – Executive and senior management occupationsSub-Major Group600 – Management occupationsMinor Group6001 – Sales, marketing and advertising managersNOC Code60010

duties: Plan, direct, and evaluate the activities of sales departments in commercial and industrial establishments.
Establish organizational policies and procedures in relation to sales.
Lead and motivate sales teams to reach targets and expand market reach.
Direct and evaluate the performance of sales staff and oversee training programs.
Negotiate contracts with major clients and vendors.
employment_requirements: A university degree in business administration or a related field is usually required.
Several years of experience as a sales representative or in a related occupation are required.
Experience in a specific industry (e.g., software, pharmaceuticals) is often mandatory.
job_outlook: The outlook is Good. Management roles in sales are resilient to automation and are expected to grow as Canadian businesses continue their post-pandemic expansion efforts.
labour_market_demand: Sales leadership is in high demand across Canada, especially in the B2B tech sector in Waterloo and Toronto. Companies are actively seeking international managers who can bring global perspectives and new sales methodologies to help Canadian firms expand into international markets.
High Compensation: Sales managers are among the top-earning professionals in the country.
Global Exposure: Lead teams that serve North American and international clients.
Career Advancement: Clear pathways to executive and C-suite positions.
pathways: Express Entry (FSW): Managerial roles (TEER 0) receive high points and are prioritized.
OINP Corporate Stream: For managers transferred to Ontario-based branches.
BC PNP Skills Immigration: Direct pathways for managers with job offers in British Columbia.
